fix_diff: Added closed_items support, close_loop_memory_items(), and _close_items_resolved_by_final(). Loop memory context now separates open_items from closed_items. Successful resumed/merged loops close matching prior run/branch/task records instead of deleting them. Existing repaired runtime open_items were moved to closed_items with actor, closed_at, original_item, and resolution_reason.
root_cause: Loop memory only appended failed_steps/human_strategy_approval records and had no closed_items audit trail or success-based resolver. QA treated stale historical open_items as current unresolved risk.
symptom: Self-maintenance QA repeatedly fails because historical loop open_items remain unresolved after the underlying bugs are fixed.
